diff: Token emissions beyond the Genesis Supply are permanently disabled; this cannot be reverted by Launch Agent 6 Governance. Sky Governance retains the ability to revert where Launch Agent 6 is in violation of Risk Capital requirements and emissions are required by the Risk Framework. See [A.3.2](55999acf-75fe-4adf-8584-9746ef50d3e4).
